name: io.github.nirholas/three-token-mcp
title: $THREE Token
description: Price, hold, and burn $THREE on Solana — the first MCP server whose actions burn a token.

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Base58 Solana secret key that signs burns (the wallet that holds the $THREE). Not needed for the read-only tools (three_price, three_balance). Treat like cash.

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Solana mainnet RPC endpoint. Defaults to the public cluster — bring your own (Helius / QuickNode / Triton) for production traffic.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws token API (serves /api/token/config and /api/token/price). Override only when self-hosting.

environmentVariables.name: MAX_BURN_USD
environmentVariables.description: Max USD value of $THREE a single three_burn call may destroy.

environmentVariables.name: REQUIRE_CONFIRM
environmentVariables.description: When on (default), three_burn refuses until re-issued with confirm:true. Set 0/false to disable the gate.
